history.content:
<thought>
I can see the goal 'G' in the upper-right of my current view, but the cell directly in front of me is unknown ('?'). The immediate area shows lava 'L' to my upper-left and upper-right, so moving forward risks lava. I will turn right to align with the safer route toward the goal.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
Goal G is visible just to my left in the current view. The cell in front of me appears to be '.' (safe), while the lava 'L' is to my left-front. To approach the goal without stepping into lava, I will move forward toward the open floor.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I can see the goal 'G' to my left in the current view. The cell in front of me is '.' (safe), while there is a wall '#' on my right/front boundary. To get closer to the goal, I will turn left to face directly toward 'G'.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_LEFT
</action>

<thought>
The goal 'G' is visible directly in front of me with '.' in between, and there is no lava 'L' on the forward path. I should move forward to reach the goal.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
I’m adjacent to the goal: 'G' is directly in front of me. Moving forward would place me onto the goal cell. The cell forward is not lava, so it’s safe.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>

<thought>
The goal 'G' is directly to my right (visible as G at the right side of my current row). The cell I can move into by turning right should lead to G without stepping on lava.
</thought>
<action>
TURN_RIGHT
</action>

<thought>
The goal 'G' is directly in front of me on the floor row. Moving forward will step onto the goal cell, and the front cell is not lava.
</thought>
<action>
MOVE_FORWARD
</action>
